zh.Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom: 英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Helen de Galloway於1200年出生時，她的父親Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway14歲，母親Unknown de Lacy21歲。她於1217年與Roger de Quincy 2nd Earl of Winchester在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1245年11月21日在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾享年45歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾。

zh-hans.Legit, Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Sco: 英国苏格兰度福利爾吉德布萊特
zh-hans.Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom: 英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helen de Galloway于1200年出生时，她的父亲Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway14岁，母亲Unknown de Lacy21岁。她于1217年与Roger de Quincy 2nd Earl of Winchester在英国英格兰哈普爾維古姆结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1245年11月21日在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾享年45岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Galloway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Galloway in southwest Scotland, named as ‘place of the foreign Gaels’, from Gaelic gall ‘foreigner’ + Gaidheal ‘Gael’. From the 8th century or before it was a province of Anglian Northumbria. In the 9th century it was settled by mixed Gaelic-Norse inhabitants from the Hebrides and Isle of Man.

variants.name: Gallaway
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Galloway  .

variants.name: Galway
meanings: Irish and Scottish: in most cases, probably a variant of Scottish   Galloway  , rather than from the city or county in Connacht (habitational names are rare in Ireland). During the Middle Ages Galways were wealthy merchants on the south coast of Ireland, but now the name there is largely confined to Ulster.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: When Helen de Galloway was born in 1200, her father, Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway, was 14 and her mother, Unknown de Lacy, was 21. She married Roger de Quincy 2nd Earl of Winchester in 1217, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 21 November 1245, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helen de Galloway est née en 1200, son père, Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Unknown de Lacy, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Quincy 2nd Earl of Winchester en 1217, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 novembre 1245, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helen de Galloway 1200 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway 14 und ihre Mutter Unknown de Lacy 21. Sie hat 1217 in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Roger de Quincy 2nd Earl of Winchester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. November 1245 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helen de Galloway è nata il nel 1200, sua padre, Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Unknown de Lacy, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Quincy 2nd Earl of Winchester nel 1217, nel Winchester, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 21 novembre 1245, nel Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.Legit, Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Sco: イギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアキルククウドブリト

ja.Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom: イギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Helen de Gallowayが1200年に生まれた時，父Alan FitzRoland Lord of Gallowayは14歳，母Unknown de Lacyは21歳であった。1217年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターでRoger de Quincy 2nd Earl of Winchesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1245年11月21日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで45歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Helen de Galloway(이)가 1200년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Unknown de Lacy(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1217년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 Roger de Quincy 2nd Earl of Winchester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1245년 11월 21일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom: Coontie o Aiberdeen, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helen de Galloway nasceu em 1200, seu pai, Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Unknown de Lacy, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Quincy 2nd Earl of Winchester em 1217, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de novembro de 1245, em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helen de Galloway родилась в 1200 г., её отцу по имени Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Unknown de Lacy, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Quincy 2nd Earl of Winchester в 1217 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 21 ноября 1245 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helen de Galloway nació en 1200, su papá, Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Unknown de Lacy, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Roger de Quincy 2nd Earl of Winchester en 1217, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de noviembre de 1245, en Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
